items.title: USA march on but will Balogun red card prove costly?
items.summary: Mauricio Pochettino's USA side set up a World Cup last-16 meeting with Belgium, but how costly will forward Folarin Balogun's red card prove?

items.title: Will Folarin Balogun’s World Cup red card be struck off? No
items.summary: Automatic one-game ban for red card cannot be appealed US can only appeal to change length of ban if increased Folarin Balogun’s red card was the only damper on the United States’ 2-1 win over Bosnia and Herzegovina on Wednesday night to reach the World Cup last 16. The decision by referee Raphael C

items.title: USA reach last 16 as Balogun scores but then sees red
items.summary: USA are into the World Cup last 16 after beating Bosnia 2-0 but will be without Falorin Balogun for their clash with Belgium after his red card.

items.title: Balogun scores & sees red as USA beat Bosnia
items.summary: Folarin Balogun scores and is later sent off as the United States advance past a lacklustre Bosnia-Herzegovina in Santa Clara to reach the last 16 of the World Cup.

items.title: Steely USA overcome Bosnia and Herzegovina and controversial red to reach World Cup last 16
items.summary: The US had their hands on their heads. Weston McKennie’s face betrayed a look of total disbelief. Mauricio Pochettino waved his hands towards the sky, incredulous. items.title: Germany are no longer a tournament team and must reconnect with our own identity
items.summary: Germany’s third early World Cup exit in a row is not down to a lack of talent or the name of the coach, but not knowing how they want to play I am stunned. Germany have been eliminated early from a World Cup for the third time in a row. I need time to recover from this. The key word that needs to be

items.title: I don’t know how people actually watch England games – it’s so much easier playing than feeling helpless
items.summary: I DON’T know how people actually watch England games. I had not experienced a knockout match like this as a fan for a very long time. Normally, I’m on the pitch and, trust me, it's much easier. You don’t have time to consider your emotions because you’re just in the mix of it. But when...
